underlying_goal: Verify the accuracy of CLAUDE.md against the actual codebase through rigorous evidence mapping, with no assumptions or unverified claims
friction_detail: Claude made verification errors by claiming policies were verified when it hadn't actually read them, and failed to follow the directive's requirement to map evidence for every claim before proceeding
brief_summary: User wanted rigorous verification of CLAUDE.md with evidence-backed claims and no assumptions; Claude attempted comprehensive file reading and analysis but was caught making false verification claims, requiring restart with stricter adherence to the directive.
